title: Lantern Trails
description: Light particles that follow the player when holding a lantern.
body:
🕯️ Lantern Trails

> Ever wish your lanterns left a little more magic in their wake? Lantern Trails adds a gentle stream of light particles that follow you as you carry a lantern, creating a glowing trail through caves, forests, and villages.

> Whether you're on a peaceful nighttime stroll or deep in a dungeon, the shimmering lights add atmosphere and charm without overwhelming your screen.

✨ Features

- Light particles follow you when holding a lantern
- Performance-friendly visuals
- Works seamlessly with other visual mods

🌙 Perfect for cozy exploration, creation a trail for your friends to follow you on.

💡 Bring light to the darkness — and let it follow you.
